title: Supplementary Protocol between the Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland and the Government of the United States of America amending the Convention for the Avoidance of Double Taxation and the Prevention of Fiscal Evasion with respect to Taxes on Income signed at Washington on 16 April 1945, as modified by the Supplementary Protocols signed at Washington on 6 June 1946, 25 May 1954 and 19 August 1957
subject: TAXATION
